changes.comment: Add an explicit, additive `logger?` option to `FeishuTransportOptions` (a package-owned minimal `TransportLogger` interface) so a host can fold the transport's own diagnostics — Lark SDK logging, WebSocket connection lifecycle, and best-effort doc-comment/metadata/bot-info/socket-close failures — into its per-component log. Instance-level: each transport derives its SDK and connection sinks from the injected logger. With no logger the historical stderr behavior is preserved byte-for-byte (issue #74).
